settings.name: Affan
settings.role: Oyama Productions - CEO | Sosai COO oversight

priorities.text: Align Mission Control features tightly to the original spec files and current realtime operating goals
Make the UI feel closer to Azure DevOps, Azure Cloud, and Teams influenced operations tooling
Keep task execution, agent collaboration, memory, and documents visible in one control surface

tasks.title: Convert Mission Control shell to left sidebar app layout
tasks.description: Replace the top-tab dominant shell with a left navigation layout closer to the screenshot references and Azure-inspired control surfaces.

tasks.title: Add org chart hierarchy view for agents and company roles
tasks.description: Show leadership, execution roles, and support/worker agents in a proper hierarchy view with role cards.

tasks.title: Improve office avatar scene and realtime activity visuals
tasks.description: Make the office view more expressive with richer avatar placement, current work labels, and better visual state cues.

tasks.title: Audit 0-Memory through 8-Layered-AI-Model-Stack and map missing features
tasks.description: Go file by file, identify what is implemented, what is partial, and what is still missing or intentionally deferred.

tasks.title: Make projects portfolio reflect actual progress and ownership
tasks.description: Repurpose Projects into a polished portfolio overview with progress bars, status, owner, and priority.

tasks.title: Add visual memory browser and saved docs viewer
tasks.description: Provide operator-friendly views for long-term memory, daily logs, and saved documents the user sends.

tasks.title: Initial realtime task board, logs, conversations, projects, memory, docs, and office views
tasks.description: First structural pass completed to move beyond the original template and toward a fuller mission control system.

executionLogs.title: Spec audit started
executionLogs.detail: Reviewing the nine original source files and mapping them against current Mission Control and workspace state.

executionLogs.title: Mission Control-focused files identified
executionLogs.detail: 1-create-HTML-prompt, 2-create-modules, 3-backend-server, and 4-config are the main app implementation specs; others are system/config/integration tasks.

projects.name: Mission Control
projects.description: Central dashboard for tasks, projects, activity, docs, memory, team structure, and realtime execution visibility.

projects.name: OpenClaw Setup
projects.description: Config, hardening, agent design, integrations, and operating rules for the local OpenClaw system.

projects.name: Agent Org Infrastructure
projects.description: Role design, coordination patterns, checks and balances, and agent operating structure.

memoryEntries.title: Long-Term Memory
memoryEntries.summary: Project folder defaults, Mission Control focus, multi-agent operating model, and runtime safety defaults.
memoryEntries.content: The workspace now reflects the user's preference for C:\Users\faree\Desktop\openclaw as the default project location, Mission Control as the main active project, a role-based multi-agent company model, and cautious runtime safety defaults.

memoryEntries.title: Spec Alignment Notes
memoryEntries.summary: Original source files are being audited one by one to ensure the final system matches the real operating goal.
memoryEntries.content: Mission Control now needs continued iteration for sidebar layout, org chart, stronger office avatars, and deeper alignment to the original prompt files.

documents.title: Mission Control Spec Audit
documents.summary: Audit of 0-Memory through 8-Layered-AI-Model-Stack against current implementation.
documents.content: See SPEC-AUDIT.md in the project root for the current mapping of implemented, partial, deferred, and missing features.

documents.title: Realtime Mission Control Direction
documents.summary: Task-first dashboard with projects, memory, docs, org chart, logs, conversations, and office avatars.
documents.content: The dashboard is moving toward a more complete mission control with Azure/Teams influence and realtime visibility into task execution and agent coordination.

conversations.message: Set the remaining UI upgrades as tasks and go through each original source file one by one.
Audit in progress. Mission Control UI specs are being separated from broader OpenClaw configuration and integration tasks.

activity.title: Spec audit created
activity.detail: Wrote SPEC-AUDIT.md to map each original source file to current implementation status.

activity.title: Tasks refreshed
activity.detail: Added the next major UI and alignment items into the Mission Control task board state.

activity.title: Mobile API fix identified
activity.detail: Frontend API base was hardcoded to localhost, which breaks server calls from phone/LAN access. Switched to window.location.origin based routing.

agents.name: Sosai
agents.description: Chief operating officer for the system. Owns execution oversight, delegation, and project movement.

activity.message: Shifted Mission Control toward side-nav mobile reviewability and clearer GitOps visibility.

agents.name: Herald
agents.description: A specialist consultant for technical SEO, AI search optimization, audit scoring, and sharp implementation guidance.
agents.performanceNotes: Should operate as a true specialist craft master, not a generic helper.

activity.message: Prepared specialist SEO/AISO audit positioning and report expectations.

agents.name: Forge-02
agents.description: Turns strategy into scripts, briefs, publishing assets, and repurposing plans.
agents.performanceNotes: Strong execution partner once campaign direction is clear.

agents.name: Pulse-04
agents.description: Summarizes performance, diagnoses bottlenecks, and suggests reinvestment priorities.

decisions.question: Which growth loop should receive the next execution sprint?
decisions.summary: Prioritized YouTube-to-email acquisition over low-intent short-form reach.

decisions.question: How should content production be systemized for agent handoffs?
decisions.summary: Split ideation, scripting, editing QA, and distribution into four distinct responsibilities.
